allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k in \('dependencies','peerDependencies'\)}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; versions=[v for v in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if 'alpha' not in v and 'beta' not in v and 'rc' not in v]; print\(versions[-1]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k in \('exports','main','module','sideEffects'\)}, indent=2\)\)")
